§7Want to help translate this pack into other languages? Create an overlay pack that does! All of the necessary tools can be found on the Official H+ Discord.
hplus.config.tab.kofi.header: This tab only affects Ko-Fi betas.
hplus.config.tab.kofi.header2: If you want early access to updates and new features, you can join by
hplus.config.tab.kofi.pets.disclaimer: Pet Models will be released to the public once all base models are completed.
hplus.config.tab.kofi.environments.discl: Environments will be released to the public once they are completed.
hplus.config.toggle.pets.arachnophobia.f: Makes them extra terrifying. Not for the feint of heart.

hplus.config.items.items.the_fish.descri: Enable or disable textures of The Fish.
Enable or disable Travel Scroll textures.
hplus.config.items.items.misc.descriptio: Enable or disable item textures that don't fit any of the other toggles.

hplus.config.items.cosmetics.backpack_sk: Enable or disable Backpack Skin textures.
hplus.config.items.cosmetics.runes.descr: Enable or disable Basic Rune textures.
hplus.config.items.cosmetics.unique_rune: Enable or disable Fire Sale Rune textures.
hplus.config.items.other.currency.descri: Enable or disable Dropped Currency textures. (Coins, Essence, etc)
Enable or disable SkyBlock Glitched Item textures.
hplus.config.items.other.bedwars.descrip: Enable or disable item textures from Bedwars and Bedwars Dreams. (§cBroken§7)
Enable or disable weapon textures from Murder Mystery. (§cBroken§7)
hplus.config.tweaks.aote_aotv.descriptio: Decides which textures are used for Aspect of the End and Aspect of the Void.
hplus.config.tweaks.legacy_axes.descript: Reverts weapons that were changed when Galatea released back into Axes.
hplus.config.tweaks.legacy_treecapitator: Reverts Treecapitator back to its obsidian-based texture from before Galatea's release.
Decides whether to use a custom model for the placed Totem of Corruption.
hplus.config.tweaks.golden_fish.descript: Decides whether to use a custom model when encountering a Golden Fish.
hplus.config.tweaks.vanilla_garden_crops: Changes the design of the Sunflower, Moonflower, and Wild Rose textures to align more with vanilla.
hplus.config.tweaks.left_handed_gloves.d: Decides whether Gloves and Gauntlets display their left or right-handed model.
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.models.descrip: Enable or Disable Armor textures displayed on the player model.
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.icons.descript: Enable or Disable Armor inventory icon textures.
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.masks.descript: Enable or Disable Mask Armor icon textures.
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.blocks.descrip: Enable or Disable Block Helmet armor textures.
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.player_heads.d: Enable or Disable Player Head Armor retextures. §8(Currently only Wither Armor)
hplus.config.tweaks.armor.dye.descriptio: Enable or Disable whether Armor is dyeable.
hplus.config.tweaks.big.staves.descripti: Decides staff sizes when held in hand and in the UI.
hplus.config.tweaks.big.scythes.descript: Decides scythe sizes when held in hand and in the UI.
hplus.config.tweaks.big.longswords.descr: Decides longsword and katana sizes when held in hand and in the UI.
hplus.config.tweaks.big.fishing_rods.des: Decides the size of the Giant Fishing Rod when held in hand and in the UI.
hplus.config.tweaks.big.misc.description: Decides the size of other (largely unused) giant items when held in hand and in the UI.
Change whether Shortbows visibly fire arrows when left-clicking.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.aotj: Aspect of the Jerry Parley Brows
hplus.config.animation.weapons.aotj.desc: Change whether Aspect of the Jerry rolls its eyebrows on right-click.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.aote_aotv: Aspect of the End/Void Teleport Flash
Change whether Aspect of the End/Void flash on teleport.
Aspect of the End/Void Etherwarp Opening
Change whether Aspect of the End/Void open when using Etherwarp.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.necron_bl: Change whether Necron's Blade and its upgraded forms flash when using scroll abilities.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.zombie_sw: Change whether Zombie Swords flash when healing.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.hollow_wa: Change whether Hollow Wand visually shows glyphs being inputted.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.celeste_s: Change whether Celeste and Starlight Wands flash when casting.
Change whether Ink Wand squishes when casting Ink Bomb.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.pigman_sw: Change whether Pigman Sword displays fire when casting Burning Souls.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.sinseeker: Change whether Sinseeker Scythe flashes when casting Sinrecall.
hplus.config.animation.weapons.voodoo_do: Change whether Voodoo Dolls get stabbed when casting Acupuncture.
hplus.config.animation.tools.drill.descr: Change whether Drills spin when mining.
hplus.config.animation.tools.vacuum.desc: Change whether Vacuums have debris inside when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.hydrocan.de: Change whether HydroCan™s visually pour and fill up with water.
hplus.config.animation.tools.plant_diagn: Change whether the Plant Diagnostics Tool's meter moves when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.abiphone.de: Change whether Abiphones turn on when held or hovered over.
hplus.config.animation.tools.wand_of_hea: Change whether the Wands of Healing, Mending, Restoration, Atonement, and Strength flash when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.aotl.descri: Change whether Aspect of the Leech opens when casting Weird Transmission.
hplus.config.animation.tools.royal_pigeo: Change whether Royal Pigeons visually squawk when used.
Change whether Egglocators blink when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.soul_esowar: Change whether Soul Esowards blink when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.etherwarp_c: Change whether Etherwarp Conduits open when sneaking.
hplus.config.animation.tools.detective_s: Change whether Detective Scanners sniff when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.healing_mel: Change whether Healing Melons visually get eaten when used.
hplus.config.animation.tools.holy_ice.de: Change whether Holy Ice flashes when used.
hplus.config.animation.items.spraying.de: Change whether Sprayonator, Pest Repellent, and Spray Cans visually spray when used.
Change whether Ubik's Cube rotates when used.
hplus.config.animation.items.revive_ston: Change whether Revive Stones visually break when used.
hplus.config.animation.items.haunt.descr: Change whether the Haunt Button in dungeons hides when used.
hplus.config.animation.easter_eggs.held_: Toggles various easter egg animations that only appear when held in hand.
hplus.config.animation.easter_eggs.right: Toggles various easter egg animations that only appear when right-click is held.
hplus.config.ui.fire_overlay.description: Change the transparency of the first-person fire overlay.
May interact strangely with some shaders.
hplus.config.ui.player_list_ping.descrip: Removes the Ping indicators from the player list shown when pressing
hplus.config.kofi.pets.models.descriptio: Enable or disable overworld pet models.
hplus.config.kofi.pets.icons.description: Enable or disable pet UI icons.
hplus.config.kofi.pets.skins.description: Change whether Pet Skins appear as heads or have models and textures.
hplus.config.kofi.pets.arachnophobia.des: Disables the Spider and Tarantula pet models.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.dwarven_m: Enable or disable Dwarven Metal block textures throughout all of SkyBlock.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.gemstones: Enable or disable Gemstone block textures throughout all of SkyBlock.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.crystal_h: Enable or disable environment textures in the Crystal Hollows.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.glacite_t: Enable or disable environment textures in the Glacite Tunnels.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.crimson_i: Enable or disable environment textures in the Crimson Isle.
hplus.config.kofi.environments.dwarven_f: Enable or disable the fog effect in the Dwarven Mines and Glacite Tunnels.
